security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* https://api.openai.com; media-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Ideas into writing, without losing the thread.
bundle.longDescription: A local-first writing studio for exploring ideas, shaping drafts, and preserving creative process history.
